indication: MEKINIST is indicated, in combination with dabrafenib, for the treatment of pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with low-grade glioma (LGG) with a BRAF V600E mutation who require systemic therapy.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to trametinib in combination with dabrafenib for the treatment of pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with low-grade glioma (LGG) with a BRAF V600E mutation who require systemic therapy.

document.name: Mekinist (trametinib) [package insert]. FDA.
